final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: illustration
Asset type: children's picture book illustration, suitable for ages 3-8
Primary request: a cute red panda wearing round glasses and blue striped overalls reading a book in a cozy treehouse library
Scene/backdrop: warm treehouse library interior with wooden shelves filled with colorful books, round windows showing golden autumn forest outside
Subject: red panda with round glasses and blue striped overalls, sitting on a beanbag chair holding an open book
Style/medium: children's book illustration, cute and whimsical, rounded smooth lines, bright saturated colors
Composition/framing: medium shot showing the treehouse interior, cozy and inviting atmosphere
Lighting/mood: warm sunlight streaming through round windows creating soft light spots on pages, cozy and heartwarming
Color palette: warm golden yellows + soft browns + bright blues + autumn oranges + cozy cream whites
Materials/textures: soft fabric beanbag, glossy book covers, wooden textures, fluffy fur
Constraints: keep the red panda as main character with round glasses and blue striped overalls, maintain cute rounded style suitable for young children
Avoid: realistic proportions, sharp angles, dark shadows, complex details overwhelming for children, photorealistic rendering
